## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .`, `ruff format --check .` and `mypy` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Touched any `static/*.js` file? Ran the Playwright e2e test (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Touched user-visible UI strings? Added the key to every file under `static/locales/`
- [ ] Changed project JSON shape? Bumped `SCHEMA_VERSION` and added a migration step
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]` for user-facing changes
